overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a sunlit Hellenistic city with classical architecture, waterfront promenades, and grand staircases. The clip transitions between a waterfront area and a formal garden plaza before ascending a monumental staircase.

events.description: screen fades to black indicating a time or location transition

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past decorative planters and palm trees

entered.detail: large ornate planter with geometric patterns containing palm trees
group of palm trees in large decorative pots
ancient stone building with columns and pediment in the background
calm waterway reflecting the sky and surrounding architecture
large recumbent lion sculpture beside the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit waterfront promenade lined with decorative stone planters and palm trees. Classical architecture and a stone lion statue are visible across the calm waterway as the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden plaza with statues and cypress trees

events.description: fade in from black to a new location with an eagle now visible on the character's shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking through the formal garden plaza with an eagle perched on her shoulder

notable_agents.action: eagle perched on the character's left shoulder

entered.detail: tall dark green cypress trees lining the plaza
tall white marble statue of a warrior with spear on a pedestal
stone fire bowl with flames burning atop a column
rectangular planters with red and yellow flowers
wide stone staircase with many steps leading upward between stone walls
circular colonnaded building with domed roof

segments.scene_description: After a transition, the character appears in a formal garden plaza with an eagle on her shoulder. She walks toward a grand staircase flanked by cypress trees, marble statues, and burning braziers.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide marble staircase
character reaches the top of the staircase and enters the upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the temple entrance above

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor walking down the stairs carrying a spear

entered.detail: intricate patterned stone flooring at the base of the stairs
decorative stone wall with crisscross pattern along the right side
large stone sphinx sculpture at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand marble staircase flanked by decorative lattice railings. A guard in red armor descends the opposite direction as the character climbs toward the sphinx-topped entrance above.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace plaza with temple entrance

events.description: character stops ascending and turns to survey the upper plaza

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs and looking around the upper terrace plaza

notable_agents.action: guard patrolling near the temple entrance

entered.detail: monumental gateway with columns and pediment at the temple entrance
elaborate geometric stone tile pattern covering the upper terrace
marble sculpture on a pedestal in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters a spacious upper terrace with intricate mosaic flooring and a monumental temple gateway ahead. Guards patrol the area as the character surveys the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit waterfront promenade that showcases the grandeur of a classical city. It begins by trailing a character in ancient Egyptian attire as they walk past decorative stone planters and swaying palm trees. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal a calm waterway reflecting the bright light, with classical architecture and a stone lion statue standing prominently across the water. The scene maintains this steady forward momentum, emphasizing the seamless blend of natural greenery and monumental stone masonry.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a formal garden plaza up to a monumental temple terrace. It begins with the character walking through a garden flanked by cypress trees, marble statues, and burning braziers with an eagle perched on her shoulder. As she moves forward, the scene shifts to an ascent up a grand marble staircase with decorative lattice railings, passing a guard in red armor descending in the opposite direction. The camera then follows her toward a sphinx-topped entrance before finally opening onto a spacious upper terrace. This final area reveals intricate mosaic flooring and a monumental temple gateway where guards patrol the sunlit surroundings.
